headline: FICO Enhances FICO® Score Mortgage Simulator with New Automated Credit Planning Features
summary: BOZEMAN, Mont., May 27, 2026--FICO enhances FICO Score Mortgage Simulator with tools to empower mortgage professionals with smarter ways to guide borrowers to better loan options
